Package org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources

Class TraceContext

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.TraceContext
public final class TraceContext extends Object
Reflective accessor for the currently-active OpenTelemetry trace / span id, used by LogEntryFormatter to populate the optional {traceId} / {spanId} log fields.
Optional / reflective coupling

OpenTelemetry is not a compile-time dependency of juneau-microservice. This class probes for io.opentelemetry.api.trace.Span via Class.forName(String) at class-load time — mirroring how MdcAsyncListener reflectively handles SLF4J. When OTel is absent from the runtime classpath the class gracefully degrades: isAvailable() returns false and currentTraceId() / currentSpanId() return the empty string, so the {traceId} / {spanId} placeholders render empty.

Where the id comes from

The id is read from Span.current().getSpanContext() — the OTel context active on the calling thread. Inside a @RestOp handler (or a custom observation) wrapped by the OTel TracerHook, that is the request / observation span. An invalid (no active trace) context yields the empty string.

Since:
10.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    currentSpanId()
    Returns the span id of the OTel span active on the current thread.
    static String
    currentTraceId()
    Returns the trace id of the OTel span active on the current thread.
    static boolean
    isAvailable()
    Returns whether the OpenTelemetry trace API is available on the runtime classpath.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • isAvailable

      public static boolean isAvailable()
      Returns whether the OpenTelemetry trace API is available on the runtime classpath.

      When false, currentTraceId() and currentSpanId() always return the empty string.

      Returns:
      true if io.opentelemetry.api.trace.Span was found at class-load time.

    • currentTraceId

      public static String currentTraceId()
      Returns the trace id of the OTel span active on the current thread.
      Returns:
      The 32-char hex trace id, or the empty string when OTel is absent or no valid span is active.

    • currentSpanId

      public static String currentSpanId()
      Returns the span id of the OTel span active on the current thread.
      Returns:
      The 16-char hex span id, or the empty string when OTel is absent or no valid span is active.
